scripts.ci:check: npm run typecheck && npm run runtime:check
scripts.vercel:build: npm run clean && npm run build:preflight && node node_modules/next/dist/bin/next build
scripts.build:strict: npm run clean && npm run release:check && node node_modules/next/dist/bin/next build
scripts.vercel:preflight: npm run clean && npm run runtime:check && npm run typecheck
scripts.vercel:deploy-check: npm run vercel:preflight && echo "[vercel-deploy-check] Ready to run npm run build"
scripts.deploy:ready: npm run security:check && npm run vercel:preflight && npm run build
scripts.vercel:prod-ready: npm run deploy:ready && npm run deploy:production:ready
scripts.preflight:full: npm run security:check && npm run validate:env && npm run runtime:check && npm run typecheck
scripts.deploy:checklist: npm run clean && npm run preflight:full && npm run build
scripts.ci:full: npm run validate:node && npm run preflight:full && npm run build
scripts.deploy:gate: npm run clean && npm run ci:full && npm run preflight:report
scripts.postdeploy:verify: npm run smoke:health && npm run postdeploy:smoke && npm run readiness:report
scripts.release:ops: npm run clean && npm run ci:full && npm run smoke:health && npm run preflight:report && npm run readiness:report
scripts.qa:smoke-local: npm run validate:node && npm run doctor:install && npm run validate:env && npm run doctor:supabase && npm run runtime:check && npm run typecheck
scripts.release:qa: npm run clean && npm run qa:smoke-local && npm run build && npm run smoke:health && npm run readiness:report
scripts.qa:full-client: npm run qa:smoke-local && npm run qa:functional && npm run qa:report
scripts.client:ready: npm run qa:full-client && npm run ux:review
scripts.release:bundle: npm run qa:full-client && npm run ux:review && npm run release:check
scripts.preprod:bundle: npm run qa:full-client && npm run ux:review && npm run release:check && npm run preprod:validate
scripts.final:bundle: npm run qa:full-client && npm run ux:review && npm run release:check && npm run preprod:validate && npm run production:gate
scripts.release:repo:current: npm run verify:v58.11.2 && npm run release:check && npm run security:check
scripts.qa:current: npm run validate:node && npm run validate:env && npm run verify:current && npm run runtime:check && npm run typecheck && npm run security:check && npm run performance:check && npm run hardening:final:check && npm run ops:check && npm run deploy:production:ready
scripts.release:current: npm run clean && npm run release:repo:current && npm run qa:current && npm run qa:functional && npm run qa:report && npm run ux:review && npm run preprod:validate && npm run production:gate
scripts.release:repo:v54.3.3: npm run verify:current && npm run runtime:check && npm run typecheck
scripts.release:repo:v54.3.4: npm run verify:current && npm run runtime:check && npm run typecheck

scripts.release:repo:v58.5: npm run verify:current && npm run runtime:check && npm run typecheck && npm run deploy:readiness && npm run board:stability
scripts.build:preflight: npm run validate:node && npm run validate:env && npm run verify:current && npm run runtime:check && npm run typecheck && npm run deploy:readiness && npm run board:stability && npm run client:readiness:check && npm run deploy:production:ready
scripts.release:repo:v58.6: npm run verify:current && npm run runtime:check && npm run typecheck && npm run deploy:readiness && npm run board:stability && npm run client:readiness:check
scripts.release:repo:v58.7: npm run verify:current && npm run runtime:check && npm run typecheck && npm run deploy:readiness && npm run board:stability && npm run client:readiness:check && npm run deploy:production:ready
scripts.release:repo:v58.8: npm run verify:current && npm run runtime:check && npm run typecheck && npm run deploy:readiness && npm run board:stability && npm run client:readiness:check && npm run deploy:production:ready && npm run hardening:final:check
scripts.release:repo:v58.10: npm run verify:current && npm run runtime:check && npm run typecheck && npm run deploy:readiness && npm run board:stability && npm run client:readiness:check && npm run deploy:production:ready && npm run hardening:final:check
